name: Metric Gauge
description: CLI-style metric displays with value, trend indicators, and optional sparklines.

block.description: Boxed metric with border and sparkline

grid.description: Responsive grid arranging multiple metric gauges with configurable column count and thresholds

visual_brief: CLI-style metric display with the metric label in muted uppercase small text, the current value in large bold monospace type, and an optional unit suffix. A trend indicator arrow (up/down) with green/red coloring appears beside the value with a percentage change. The inline preset renders as a compact single-line display: label, value, and trend on one row. The block preset wraps the metric in a bordered card with optional sparkline underneath. The grid preset arranges multiple gauges in a responsive grid. Sparklines use ASCII braille characters or thin SVG lines.

responsive.mobile: Grid preset uses 2 columns. Block cards take full width if single. Values remain large for readability.
responsive.tablet: Grid uses 3 columns. Standard card sizes.
responsive.desktop: Grid uses 4 columns. Block preset shows full sparkline width. Comfortable spacing.
